title: Youtube Poop: Billy Mays
description:
I know its a little late, but I had to pay my respects. He was the GOD of commercials and, in my opinion, much better than Vince. We didn't just lose the commercial god, we lost a friend as well... I know its a little overused, but... R.I.P. Billy Mays... You will be missed... I worked a little harder on this for this unexpected tragedy.

Honors:

#30 - Most Discussed (Today) - Nonprofits & Activism
#63 - Most Viewed (Today) - Nonprofits & Activism - Canada
#69 - Most Viewed (Today) - Nonprofits & Activism - United Kingdom
#81 - Most Viewed (Today) - Nonprofits & Activism - Ireland
#62 - Most Viewed (Today) - Nonprofits & Activism
#15 - Top Favorited (Today) - Nonprofits & Activism
#35 - Top Rated (Today) - Nonprofits & Activism

Billy would be proud.
